ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  This document confirms AKG EXIM LIMITED's compliance with SEBI Regulation 74(5) for the quarter ended June 30, 2026, a routine regulatory filing. Its Registrar and Share Transfer Agent, MAS Services Limited, verified that all dematerialization requests were processed, confirmed to depositories, and the register of members updated within the mandated 15-day timeline. This indicates efficient and compliant handling of share transfers, ensuring operational integrity and investor confidence with no red flags identified.
